headline: Following Stryker Cyberattack, Avatier Launches Identity Challenge Card to Protect Organizations When Standard Security Fails
summary: New Solution Delivers the First Auto-Enrolled, Air-Gapped Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) That Can Be Deployed Enterprise-Wide in a Single Day: No Devices, Apps, or Network Connectivity Required Frontline industrial worker-Image A frontline industrial worker consults his Avatier Identity Challenge Card to complete authentication at a workstation — no smartphone or dedicated device required. The physical card enables secure challenge-response login that remains fully operational even when enter

content.title: Following Stryker Cyberattack, Avatier Launches Identity Challenge Card to Protect Organizations When Standard Security Fails
content.summary: New Solution Delivers the First Auto-Enrolled, Air-Gapped Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) That Can Be Deployed Enterprise-Wide in a Single Day: No Devices, Apps, or Network Connectivity Required Frontline industrial worker-Image A frontline industrial worker consults his Avatier Identity Challenge Card to complete authentication at a workstation — no smartphone or dedicated device required. The physical card enables secure challenge-response login that remains fully operational even when enter

thumbnail.caption: A frontline industrial worker consults his Avatier Identity Challenge Card to complete authentication at a workstation — no smartphone or dedicated device required. The physical card enables secure challenge-response login that remains fully operational even when enterprise identity systems are compromised.

headline: Orthopedic Implants Global Market Forecast Report 2026-2036: North America Dominates the $55+ Billion Market Due to Advanced Infrastructure and Presence of Leading Manufacturers
summary: The global orthopedic implants market is projected to reach USD 88.6 billion by 2036, up from USD 55.8 billion in 2026, growing at a CAGR of 5.8% (2026-2036). The market's expansion is fueled by an aging population and higher incidences of musculoskeletal disorders which drive demand for joint replacement and spinal interventions. Rising trends in minimally invasive surgeries and robotic assistance present growth opportunities. Dominant product types include joint and spinal implants. Metallic m

headline: Stock Market Today, April 22: Boston Scientific Jumps After Q1 Earnings Beat Resets Growth Expectations
summary: On April 22, 2026, investors weigh a rare combo of earnings strength and softer long-term targets reshaping this medtech leader’s outlook.
